title: mc-operator Helm chart values
description: Configuration values for the mc-operator Helm chart

io.k8s.api.core.v1.PullPolicy.description: PullPolicy describes a policy for if/when to pull a container image. https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/images/#image-pull-policy

io.k8s.api.core.v1.ResourceList.description: ResourceList is a set of (resource name, quantity) pairs. https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/kubernetes-api/common-definitions/quantity/

io.k8s.api.core.v1.Toleration.description: Toleration allows the pod to tolerate any taint that matches the given key/value/effect. https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/kubernetes-api/workload-resources/pod-v1/#scheduling

key.description: Taint key the toleration applies to. Empty matches all keys

operator.description: Relationship between the key and value

value.description: Taint value the toleration matches to

effect.description: Taint effect to match. Empty matches all effects

tolerationSeconds.description: Duration the toleration tolerates the taint (only for NoExecute effect)

io.k8s.api.core.v1.Affinity.description: Affinity is a group of affinity scheduling rules. https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/kubernetes-api/workload-resources/pod-v1/#scheduling

tag.description: Image tag. Defaults to the chart appVersion when empty

imagePullSecrets.description: List of image pull secret references

name.description: Name of the secret containing registry credentials

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified app name

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the operator pod

limits.description: Maximum resources the operator may consume

nodeSelector.description: Node selector labels for the operator pod

affinity.description: Affinity rules for the operator pod

create.description: Create a dedicated ServiceAccount for the operator

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the ServiceAccount (e.g. for IRSA or Workload Identity)

name.description: ServiceAccount name. Auto-generated from the release name when create is true and name is empty

namespace.description: Namespace where the operator is deployed

webhooks.description: Admission webhook configuration. Webhooks are always enabled and TLS certificates are auto-generated.

port.description: HTTPS port for the webhook server

leaderElection.description: Leader election configuration for high-availability deployments

enabled.description: Enable leader election so only one replica actively reconciles at a time

logLevel.description: Log verbosity level for the operator
